jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Laurus Labs
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Laurus Labs in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Laurus Labs:
Laurus Labs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs!
